summary: The diff only modifies `project_state.json`, a metadata/state tracking file. The actual source files required by REQ-16 — `frontend/src/lib/binance-auth.ts` and `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` — are not present in the diff at all. While the project_state.json summary text mentions 'fapi/v2/positionRisk', the actual code changes to the frontend source files have not been made (or are not reflected in the diff).

missing_requirements.requirement: Update every reference to the Binance position risk endpoint from https://fapi.binance.com/fapi/v1/positionRisk to https://fapi.binance.com/fapi/v2/positionRisk in frontend/src/lib/binance-auth.ts and frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts.
missing_requirements.reason: Neither frontend/src/lib/binance-auth.ts nor frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts appear in the diff. Only project_state.json was modified. The actual source code changes required to switch the endpoint URL have not been applied.
